queries.title: Paper with Code benchmark comparison
queries.query: For task of text-to-SQL, which models have the most complete and comparable benchmark results (same datasets/metrics) so I can compare them fairly?

queries.title: Resource-constrained code generation (32B limit)
queries.query: I have one server that can run up to a 32B model. For the task of code generation, which models give the best quality under this size limit?

queries.title: Customer support chat (helpfulness + safety)
queries.query: I need a model for customer-support chat. Which models are strong on helpfulness but also show low toxicity or safer behavior in reported evaluations?

queries.title: Quantization accuracy (4-bit)
queries.query: I'm deploying with 4-bit quantization. Which models keep strong accuracy after quantization, and what benchmarks show the drop?
